creator: trust_no_1@libero.it
text:
Hello,
just to report that after an upgrade to FreeBSD 10.2 (see later) and a "portsnap fetch update", I have successfully compiled and installed thunderbird-38.2.0_1

Thanks.

root@dukefleed:~ # uname -a
FreeBSD dukefleed.2mh.it 10.2-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p1 #4 r286936: Thu Aug 20 03:37:13 CEST 2015     root@dukefleed.2mh.it:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/DUKEFLEED  amd64
root@dukefleed:~ #
